title: You're not ready for her yet.
caption:
The longing is real. The timing isn't.

Here's what most men skip: the desperate guy doesn't just fail to get the girl — he gets her, and then makes her carry something she was never built to carry. She can tell the difference between a man pursuing her and a man pursuing what she represents. One draws her in. The other wears her out.

This season isn't a waiting room. The discipline, the prayer, the hard work nobody sees — that's the formation. What you build in private, she'll inherit in public.

"Seek first his kingdom and his righteousness, and all these things will be added to you." — Matthew 6:33.

Stop chasing what God is building you toward. Chase Him.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #discipleship #christiandating #masculinity #thevision #scripture
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
